name: Ashley- Disventure Camp
description:
Ashley was a contestant on Disventure Camp (Season 1) as a member of the Purple Team. She placed 10th. She returns as a contestant in Disventure Camp: All-Stars as a member of the Magenta Team.

Despite being an early boot on her first season, Ashley is memorable for being a friendly and supportive teammate, and for overcoming her fear of fire in order to help her team win a challenge.
creator: TDI_Fan
